---
title: "Computational tools for decision-focused learning"
bibliography: index.bib
---

The present page contains material for a summer school organized by CERMICS in Fréjus in 2026.
The goal is to present two central ideas, which enabled the deep learning revolution and should be used more widely in operations research: [automatic differentiation](./autodiff.qmd) and [GPU programming](./gpu.qmd).

These are very rough notes, useful mostly as reminders.
If you want to learn this stuff for yourself, read the books by @blondelElementsDifferentiableProgramming2025 and @hwuProgrammingMassivelyParallel2022.

::: {#refs}
:::
